exam_metadata.general_instructions: Choose the correct options and write efficient implementations as directed.

Section_A_MCQs.instructions: Attempt all 20 questions. (0.5 marks each, Total: 10 marks)

questions.question: What is the output of the type() function when called on 10.5?
Which string slicing syntax correctly reverses the string s?
What is the result of the expression 9 // 2 in Python?
Which of the following is considered a 'falsy' value in Python?
Which statement is used to completely terminate a loop prematurely?
What sequence of numbers is generated by range(1, 4)?
If a function definition includes *args, what data type does args become?
What is a characteristic feature of a lambda function?
What is the difference between append() and insert() in a list?
options: append adds at the end, insert adds at a specific index
append adds multiple elements, insert adds one
append is for lists, insert is for tuples
questions.correct_answer: append adds at the end, insert adds at a specific index

questions.question: Which of the following statements about Tuples is true?
options: They are declared using square brackets []

questions.question: How do you correctly retrieve a list of all keys in a dictionary named my_dict?
Which operation is used to find elements that are common to two sets?
Why is the with open(...) as f: statement preferred for file operations?
options: It automatically closes the file after the block ends
It compiles the file into binary mode automatically
questions.correct_answer: It automatically closes the file after the block ends

questions.question: Which block in a try-except structure will execute regardless of whether an exception occurred or not?
Which built-in module would you import to generate random numbers?
In a Python class, what does the __init__ method represent?
What is the purpose of the self keyword in instance methods?
options: To refer to the parent class
To refer to the current instance of the class
questions.correct_answer: To refer to the current instance of the class

questions.question: How do you indicate a private attribute by convention in Python?
options: Prefixing the name with a single or double underscore
Suffixing the name with an underscore
questions.correct_answer: Prefixing the name with a single or double underscore

questions.question: What function is used to call a method from a parent class within a child class?
What is the Big O time complexity for accessing an element in an array/list by its index?

Section_B_Programs.instructions: Write code for all 3 programs. (3 marks each, Total: 9 marks)

questions.question: Write a Python function using list comprehensions that takes a list of numbers and returns a new list containing only the even numbers.
Write a snippet of code to read a file named 'data.txt', count the frequency of each word using a dictionary, and print the resulting dictionary.

Create a class BankAccount with an __init__ method that initializes a balance. Include a deposit(amount) method that adds to the balance and a withdraw(amount) method that subtracts from it (ensure balance doesn't go below zero).

Section_C_Long_Programs.instructions: Write detailed code for the program. (6 marks, Total: 6 marks)

questions.question: Implement a Singly Linked List from scratch using OOP principles. Your code must include a Node class and a LinkedList class. The LinkedList class should have methods to: 1) append(data) to add a node to the end, 2) search(data) to return True if the data exists, and 3) display() to print all items in the list.

Section_D_Short_Answers.instructions: Answer all 5 questions. (1 mark each, Total: 5 marks)

questions.question: What is the worst-case Big O time complexity of the Bubble Sort algorithm, and why?
Briefly describe the core mechanism of Selection Sort in one or two sentences.
Which sorting algorithm builds the final sorted array one element at a time by repeatedly taking the next element and inserting it into its correct position in the already sorted part?
Merge Sort is built upon which fundamental algorithmic paradigm/strategy?
In the Quick Sort algorithm, what is the specific role of the 'pivot' element?
